description_long: This is a freestanding, A-frame advertising board constructed primarily from weathered wood, with a chalkboard or painted surface for displaying messages. The board features hand-painted white text in Dutch, advertising a restaurant called 'Van Aken' and promoting food, drinks, street food, and live music. The front and back panels are rectangular and supported by two angled side legs, forming a triangular profile when viewed from the side. The surface shows signs of wear and exposure, with visible scuffs and faded paint, suggesting outdoor use. The text is bold and legible, with playful, informal typography that draws attention to the board's content.
description: A weathered, wooden A-frame advertising board with hand-painted Dutch text promoting a restaurant and live music. The board features a dark, chalkboard-like surface with bold white lettering and visible signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the triangular A-frame structure and the supporting legs, with the board's surface angled inward.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main advertising surface with bold white Dutch text and the restaurant's promotional content.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the triangular A-frame profile and the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Rear view showing additional hand-painted text in Dutch, with similar style and weathered appearance as the front.
attribute_frame_design: thick wooden frame forming an A-frame structure with visible wear and no decorative elements
attribute_advertisement_content: Hand-painted Dutch text advertising a restaurant, food, drinks, street food, and live music
